---
title: "Bird Abundance"
author: Alex Gonzales, Ethan Castelazo, Zelda Reif
source: editor
format: 
  pdf:
    include-in-header: 
       text: |
         \usepackage{fvextra}
         \DefineVerbatimEnvironment{Highlighting}{Verbatim}{breaklines,commandchars=\\\{\}}
         \DefineVerbatimEnvironment{OutputCode}{Verbatim}{breaklines,commandchars=\\\{\}}
---

# Set up
## Packages

```{r}
#| label: packages

# general use
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(snakecase)

#Wrap Axis Label
library(scales)

#reading .xlsx files
library(readxl)

# visualize missing data
library(naniar)

# visualizing
library(patchwork)
```

## Data 
```{r}
#| label: data
birds <- read_csv(here("data", "birds.csv"))

venoco_water <- read_csv(here("data", "venoco-water.csv"))

```

## wrangling birds

```{r}
#| label: bird-wrangling


ebirds_groups <- birds %>% 
  # filtered data to only include bird eBird groups
  distinct(e_bird_group) %>% 
  # grouping by e_bird_group
  group_by(e_bird_group) %>% 
  # counting total number of species per group
  summarize(num_species = sum(species))

#created a new object from birds
birds_grouped <- birds %>% 
  # exclude repeat observations
  # include only 4 eBird groups of interest
  filter(repeat_observation == "No",
         e_bird_group %in% c("Waterfowl",
                             "New World Sparrows",
                             "Herons, Ibis, and Allies",
                             "Shorebirds")) %>% 
  # filling in taxanomic information about order and families for eBird groups
  mutate(lowest_group = case_when(
    e_bird_group == "New World Sparrow" ~ "Passerellidae",
    e_bird_group == "Herons, Ibis, and Allies" ~ "Ardeidae",
    e_bird_group == "Shorebirds" ~ "Charadriiformes",
    e_bird_group == "Waterfowl" ~ "Anatidae"
  ))



# creating new object from birds_wy2025
group_species <- birds_grouped %>% 
  # grouping by eBird group
  group_by(e_bird_group) %>% 
  # finding unique species in each group
  distinct(species) %>% 
  # arrange data frame by eBird group
  arrange(e_bird_group)

```


## wrangling water

```{r}
#| label: water-wrangling

# Creating a new object from venoco_water
venoco_clean <- venoco_water |> 
  # filter to only include 2025 water year
  filter(wy == "2025") |> 
  # creating a new column to convert water elevation in ft to meters
  mutate(comp_level_m = (comp_level_ft + 2.96) * 0.3048) |> 
  # selecting columns of interest
  select(date, comp_level_m, temperature)


# create a new object from Venoco_clean
venoco_daily <- venoco_clean |> 
# group by date
  group_by(date) |> 
# calculate mean water level for each day
  summarize(mean_level_m = mean(comp_level_m, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
# ungroup the data frame
  ungroup()

```
